title: elymus racemosus var. sabulosus
intro: Elymus racemosus var. sabulosus, also known as sand lovegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This perennial grass has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Elymus racemosus var. sabulosus include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory problems like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Elymus racemosus var. sabulosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the grass in hot water or a solvent to extract its active compounds.
